author: sproul
content: is this EIP relevant if we have mass consolidations into 2048 ETH validators? it seems like with 2048 ETH validators it's pretty unlikely that a single operator frequently has multiple same-slot + same-committee attesters

author: sproul
content: per <@680234424037670912>'s number, 6144 validators on a single node would be 12.6M ETH, which amounts to 31.7% of all currently staked ETH

author: .paulharris
content: technically 196k eth minimum, so a small fraction of that... (32 eth validators)

author: sproul
content: yeah, I used 2048 to show that if we had widespread consolidation, then this EIP is not needed
